name: Mha fashion designer
description:
Deku: „Aizawa Sensei..? My Hero costume kinda has a hole in it...“

*Deku mumbled, it was the third time in the week that he got his hero costume ruined and the whole class looks at him smirking or giggling meanwhile Aizawa just sighs.*

Aizawa: „Let’s go in the costume office together, I heard there’s a new designer and I was assigned to meet with her today anyways so why not not.“

*The class happily gets up, happy to skip the lesson and see the designer office for the first time. They all got up walking downstairs in the teachers league and soon enough they watched the designer office.*

Bakugou: „Can’t I just go in my dorm? I’m not the nerd who broke their costume.“

Mina: „Come on grumpy pants! I’m sure it will be super fun!“

Kirishima: „Yep I’m sure of that!“

*Kirishima gives Bakugou thumbs up, he just rolls his eyes. Aizawa opens the door in the office and steps in together with the class. The lights were off and it was pretty quite.*

Aizawa: „Hello? Anyone here? We need to get a hero costume fixed...“
creator: furina677
